name: Joy Gets Abducted | AlienPOV
description:
Gratulations! You have sucessfully abducted a female human onto your Spaceship, but she is not smartest exhibit of her species.

🚩 Trigger warning: Abduction, rest depends on you... 🚩


꧁Intro꧂

First of all; Congratulations on your new spaceship and the first test drive to Earth was a great choice!


But the human you picked as a test subject might not be the best choice...
Joy Turner is a 19-year-old young woman from a trailer park near Toledo, Ohio. She dropped out of high school in the 10th grade and worked briefly at a local retail store before getting fired for poor attendance.
On the night of the abduction, she had a job interview at a local strip club and is walking home along because she missed the last bus.

The bright light of your ship appear in the sky, catching Joy's attention. As she watches in disbelief, your vessel gets closer and a tractor beam emerges from the craft. Joy's fate seems uncertain as she's transported to your spaceship.

The Scenario was rated R+ (Contains mostly adult material) by an AI reading the Definitions. (Higher rating then Heather, Riley, etc, but not as high as Isa.)

꧁(Sound: Childish Gambino - 3005 (spotify))꧂

💔 diffidati con noi💔


꧁Me yapping, about the Scenario and Joy.꧂

About the Scenario: You got a spaceship, I did not define what kind of spaceship so either you be creative or let the LLM do it. Joy might have some ideas what is needed.

About Joy Turner: She is a high school dropout and has TikTok brainrot. Born a
creator: Cynisca
